description: Detecting, quantifying, and modeling spatial patterns and structure in data. Variograms and covariance functions, linear predictions with uncertainty qualification, and conditional simulations. Spectral domain models and spectral densities. Spatial point processes. Contemporary applications and Gaussian process model fitting at scale.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (STAT 333or340) and (MATH 320,340,341, or375), graduate/professional standing, or declared in Statistics VISP
